name: SproutSocial
description:
An all-in-one social media marketing tool that helps you with publishing, analyzing, listening, advocacy, and influencer marketing. It also comes with many integrations with major leading platforms like Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, TikTok, X, YouTube, and Pinterest. It also comes with a set of agency features that can help them do more!

Source: G2

Features

  • It helps you organize your profiles into client-specific groups to handle permissions, reporting, and social media network
  • Manage individual posts and campaigns in a collaborative calendar to share it with people outside and inside your organization
  • Helps with generating workflows for client reviews and approvals, to maintain oversight, and to safeguard brand standards
  • Make use of optimization tools and algorithms to automatically schedule posts for the best times to post 
  • Optimize your future ad spend diligently with the help of paid performance reports 
  • Track your competitor's performance on social media to benchmark against your clients and identify new business opportunities with the help of competitor reports
  • Has an all-in-one integrated inbox that connects all networks and profiles into a single stream and monitors incoming messages 
  • Comes with a post-level reporting feature that helps you understand what resonates with your target audience and why 
  • Has a plethora of agency resources and guides 

Pros

✅Users say that it has become really easy for them to track, manage, and navigate social media analytics and the dashboard 

✅Good customer support 

Cons

❌Users say that the app tends to slow down at times which tends to affect the everyday usability of the platform by 90%

❌The platform cannot sort some messages out via sentiment and keywords in the smart inbox

❌Priced too much for small businesses which is not very sustainable in the long run

Pricing 

Starts at $199 Per Month
